tasks.description: Comment panel UI on step/section/touchpoint/stage detail panels — comment list with author, timestamp, category badge; add comment form with category dropdown; thread replies via parent_id; resolve button
acceptance_criteria: Comment panel rendered below detail panels in canvas-view.tsx and journey-canvas-view.tsx (similar placement to AnnotationPanel)
Comment list shows: author_id, relative timestamp (e.g. '2 hours ago'), category badge (note/decision/pain_point/idea/question), content text, reply count for threads
Add Comment form: category dropdown (default: note) + text input + submit button
Thread replies: clicking 'Reply' shows nested replies via parent_id, indented
Resolve button: toggles is_resolved, resolved comments visually dimmed (opacity or strikethrough)
Empty state when no comments exist ('No comments yet')
Uses existing client functions: fetchComments, createComment, updateComment, deleteComment from lib/api/client.ts

similar_files: src/components/panels/annotation-panel.tsx — same conditional-panel-below-detail-panel pattern, same commentable/annotatable type discrimination
patterns_to_follow: AnnotationPanel pattern: conditionally rendered in canvas-view.tsx when entity is selected, receives entityType + entityId props
Category badges: reuse Badge component from ui/badge.tsx with status-style coloring
Relative timestamps: use lightweight formatting (no new deps — compute from Date diff)
Loading skeleton: match AnnotationPanel skeleton pattern
Dark theme styling: use CSS custom properties (--text-primary, --bg-surface-secondary, etc.)
learnings_relevant: apiFetch unwraps envelope — fetchComments returns Comment[] directly
TipTap SSR crash — if using rich text for comment content, must lazy-load (but plain textarea is simpler and recommended for comments)
affected_urls: /w/[workspaceId]/[tabId] — process canvas with comment panel on selected step/section
/w/[workspaceId]/[tabId] — journey canvas with comment panel on selected touchpoint/stage

tasks.special_instructions: CommentableType reuses AnnotatableType (step/section/touchpoint/stage). Comment panel should appear BELOW the detail panel, similar to how AnnotationPanel appears below when a perspective is active. The comment panel should ALWAYS be visible when an entity is selected (not gated by perspective). Use plain textarea for comment input, NOT TipTap — keeps it lightweight and avoids SSR issues. Author display: show author_id for now (user lookup is a future enhancement). Category badge colors: note=gray, decision=blue, pain_point=red, idea=yellow, question=purple.

tasks.description: Add hex color format validation to perspectives API routes (POST create + PATCH update)
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/perspectives validates color field matches /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/i — returns 400 with 'Invalid color format. Must be a hex color like #14B8A6' if invalid
PATCH /api/v1/perspectives/[id] validates color field with same regex when color is in the update payload
Undefined/missing color field is allowed (not required) — validation only triggers when color is explicitly provided
Existing valid colors continue to work unchanged

similar_files: src/app/api/v1/annotations/route.ts — same validation guard pattern (VALID_ANNOTATABLE_TYPES check returns 400)
patterns_to_follow: Guard clause pattern: validate before DB insert, return errorResponse('validation', message, 400)
learnings_relevant: BUG-014 fix shows the exact validation guard pattern to follow

tasks.special_instructions: Simple regex guard. POST: validate color before insert. PATCH: validate color inside the EDITABLE_FIELDS loop (or after it, before DB update). Define HEX_COLOR_REGEX as a named constant at module scope.

shared_files.note: types/database.ts and lib/api/client.ts are read-only — the comment data layer (FEAT-045 [1/3]) is already built. No modifications needed.
